revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image for a game-development pixel-art asset.

Profile: snes16_platformer_v1
Preset: village_tree_64_80
Asset kind: field-prop
Asset type: prop
Canvas / exact sheet size: 64x80 px
Grid: 1 row x 1 column
Frame size: 64x80 px
Frames: 1
Background: solid #FF00FF chroma key filling all empty space, no gradients.

Subject: ONE small bamboo grove cluster as a single coherent pixel-art object. Front view. Five or six bright green bamboo culms with visible nodes, airy delicate leaves concentrated near the top, a few young shoots at the base, soft contact shadow, and root/base details. The cluster should fill most of the canvas while leaving a clear solid magenta margin from every edge.

Style and palette: crisp high-resolution 16-bit SNES-style pixel art with readable low-resolution pixel clusters, no antialiasing blur, consistent bright cheerful palette, dark one-pixel outline where useful, top-left light source. Bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette: deep rich saturated greens like early-summer rice-field banks, hints of clear blue-green water tones, tiny vermilion and white accent touches only if they support the prop naturally, soft warm sunlight. NOT dry, NOT yellow-brown, NOT western prairie, NOT wasteland.

Large-object quality rules: draw the bamboo grove first as one coherent authored object, not repeated small tile stamps. It may later be sliced into 16x16 engine tiles, but the viewer must perceive one coherent object. Break rectangular silhouettes with uneven bamboo heights, overhanging leaf clusters, shadows, asymmetric details, varied leaf texture, and young shoots. Preserve a clean readable footprint.

Sheet cleanliness rules: no cell separator lines, no grid lines, no frame borders, no frame numbers, no labels, no text, no watermark. No detached fragments: no isolated pixel islands, seam slivers, dust specks, or leftover residue. Keep every pixel of the bamboo object inside the single 64x80 frame with clear magenta margin.

Avoid: no Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, or Sakuna characters, logos, or likenesses. No samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, bird, companion creature, letter emblem, modern text, watermark, or UI.
